task_completion.description: Create the base rectangular sketch with dimensions 80 mm by 60 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D rectangular sketch is visible in the SolveSpace canvas with dimension constraints of 80 and 60 applied to its sides.

task_completion.description: Extrude the base sketch to a thickness of 20 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is turned into a 3D rectangular block. The extrusion property panel or constraint should show an extrusion depth of 20.

task_completion.description: Create a centered rectangular sketch on the top surface of the base block with dimensions 40 mm by 30 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new smaller 2D rectangle is sketched on the top face of the existing 3D block, with dimension constraints of 40 and 30 visible.

task_completion.description: Extrude the boss sketch 15 mm from the top surface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The smaller rectangle is extruded upwards to form a stepped block. The extrusion property panel or constraint should show a depth of 15.

task_completion.description: Save the final model as stepped_block.slvs in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' and the filename 'stepped_block.slvs', or the main SolveSpace window title updating to show this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application open with active use of its toolbars, property panels, and 3D viewport, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely constructed the 3D geometry step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the progression from a blank canvas to a 2D sketch, then a 3D extrusion, then another sketch, and final extrusion.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to generate or download a pre-made .slvs file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run scripts that bypass the manual modeling process in SolveSpace.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected model is a stepped block created in SolveSpace. Base dimensions: 80mm width x 60mm height, extruded 20mm. Boss dimensions (centered on top of base): 40mm width x 30mm height, extruded 15mm. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stepped_block.slvs'.
